title: Men in Her Life
writer: Samuel Hopkins Adams, Robert Riskin, Dorothy Howell
actors: Lois Moran, Charles Bickford, Victor Varconi
plot: A wealthy ex-bootlegger comes to the rescue of a formerly rich society girl after her gold-digging fiancé leaves her stranded when he finds out she's broke. The bootlegger proposes a deal: he will settle her debts if she teaches h...
